data.title: Mo Dan Wang
data.synopsis:
In the year 2030, Beast Pods fall like asteroids from the sky and scatter all over Earth. These are actually magical creatures called Rune Beasts from another realm who have escaped their homeland destroyed by the evil Dark Angel and his followers, the Heavenly Lords. Children all over Earth pick up these Beast Pods, and discover that they can fuse with the Rune Beast inside in an extra dimension to carry out battles with one another. Our hero, Ling Qili, becomes a leading fighter after he establishes a strong partnership with his Rune Beast, Flamewind Dragon.

(Source: IMDb)

data.title: AK Mofa Shaonu
data.synopsis:
AK Magical Girls is a story about three new transfer six grade student of the ShinHi Academy, whose true identity are in fact three music fairy came from the World of Music that fight the evil Lord of Noise to defend the peace of the world in secret.

(Source: Magical Girl Wiki)
